# Hook State Machine Implementation Plan

> **For Claude:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task.

**Goal:** Upgrade Harness Forge's hook system from advisory warnings to a file-based finite state machine that enforces stage gates, role permissions, and stage transitions вЂ” no server required.

**Architecture:** Declarative `constraints.yaml` generated by Harness Forge defines all rules. Shell hooks read this file + `state.json` to enforce at runtime. Three scripts: `guard.sh` (PreToolUse), `advance.sh` (PostToolUse), `transition.sh` (slash command). Cross-engine: Claude Code gets full enforcement, Codex/Cursor get degraded prompt-level constraints.

**Tech Stack:** TypeScript (generators), Bash + jq + yq (runtime hooks), YAML (declarative constraints)

**Known Limitations:**
- Tool rules (allow/deny per stage) are hardcoded in `getStageToolRules()`, not derived from wizard Flow config. If users customize stage dimensions, tool permissions won't change. Refactor needed when custom stages are supported.

---

### Task 1: Add YAML serialization helpers to constraints.ts

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/core/constraints.ts`

**Step 1: Add new YAML helper functions for the constraints.yaml format**

Add these helpers at the top of the file (after existing yamlString/yamlValue helpers):

```typescript
function yamlList(items: string[], indent: number): string {
  const pad = ' '.repeat(indent);
  return items.map((item) => `${pad}- ${yamlValue(item)}`).join('\n');
}

function yamlBlock(obj: Record<string, unknown>, indent: number): string {
  const pad = ' '.repeat(indent);
  const lines: string[] = [];
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(obj)) {
    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
      if (value.length === 0) continue;
      lines.push(`${pad}${key}:`);
      for (const item of value) {
        if (typeof item === 'string') {
          lines.push(`${pad}  - ${yamlValue(item)}`);
        }
      }
    } else if (typeof value === 'string') {
      lines.push(`${pad}${key}: ${yamlValue(value)}`);
    } else if (typeof value === 'boolean') {
      lines.push(`${pad}${key}: ${yamlValue(value)}`);
    } else if (typeof value === 'number') {
      lines.push(`${pad}${key}: ${value}`);
    } else if (value === null || value === undefined) {
      continue;
    }
  }
  return lines.join('\n');
}
```

**Step 2: Verify no lint errors**

Run: `npx tsc --noEmit src/generators/core/constraints.ts`
Expected: No errors (helpers are unused but valid)

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/generators/core/constraints.ts
git commit -m "feat: add YAML serialization helpers for constraints.yaml generation"
```

### Task 2: Generate `.harness/constraints.yaml` from wizard config

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/core/constraints.ts`

**Step 1: Add the `generateConstraintsYaml` function**

Add this function to `constraints.ts`. It maps the wizard's `SprintStage[]` config into the full `constraints.yaml` format (stages, roles, transitions, gates):

```typescript
function generateConstraintsYaml(config: ProjectConfig): string {
  const enabledStages = config.flow.sprint
    .filter((s) => s.enabled)
    .sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order);

  if (enabledStages.length === 0) return '';

  const lines: string[] = [
    '# .harness/constraints.yaml вЂ” Declarative constraint rules for hook state machine',
    '# Generated by Harness Forge. DO NOT EDIT manually.',
    `project: ${yamlValue(config.project.name || 'unnamed')}`,
    '',
    'stages:',
  ];

  for (let i = 0; i < enabledStages.length; i++) {
    const stage = enabledStages[i];
    const nextStage = enabledStages[i + 1];
    const artifacts = getStageArtifacts(stage);

    lines.push(`  - name: ${yamlValue(stage.name)}`);
    lines.push(`    roles:`);
    for (const role of stage.roles) {
      lines.push(`      - ${yamlValue(role)}`);
    }

    // Tools permissions per stage
    const toolRules = getStageToolRules(stage.name);
    lines.push(`    tools:`);
    lines.push(`      allow:`);
    for (const tool of toolRules.allow) {
      lines.push(`        - ${yamlValue(tool)}`);
    }
    lines.push(`      deny:`);
    for (const tool of toolRules.deny) {
      lines.push(`        - ${yamlValue(tool)}`);
    }

    // Write paths
    lines.push(`    paths:`);
    lines.push(`      write:`);
    for (const p of toolRules.writePaths) {
      lines.push(`        - ${yamlValue(p)}`);
    }

    // Gates from artifacts
    lines.push(`    gates:`);
    if (artifacts.length > 0) {
      for (const artifact of artifacts) {
        const gateId = `${stage.name}-${artifact.path.split('/').pop()?.replace(/\..*$/, '') ?? 'output'}`;
        lines.push(`      - id: ${yamlValue(gateId)}`);
        if (artifact.verification === 'exists') {
          lines.push(`        type: file_exists`);
        } else if (artifact.verification === 'non-empty') {
          lines.push(`        type: file_nonempty`);
        } else {
          lines.push(`        type: file_contains`);
          lines.push(`        marker: ${yamlValue(artifact.sectionMarker ?? '')}`);
        }
        lines.push(`        pattern: ${yamlValue(artifact.path)}`);
        lines.push(`        description: ${yamlValue(artifact.description)}`);
      }
    }

    // Enforced constraints as additional gates
    const enforcedConstraints = config.flow.constraints.filter(
      (c) => c.enforced && (c.stageId === stage.id || c.stageId === stage.name)
    );
    for (const c of enforcedConstraints) {
      if (c.enforcement?.checkType === 'file-exists' && c.enforcement.targets) {
        for (const target of c.enforcement.targets) {
          lines.push(`      - id: ${yamlValue(c.id)}`);
          lines.push(`        type: file_exists`);
          lines.push(`        pattern: ${yamlValue(target)}`);
          lines.push(`        description: ${yamlValue(c.enforcement.message ?? c.description)}`);
        }
      } else if (c.enforcement?.checkType === 'file-contains' && c.enforcement.targets) {
        for (const target of c.enforcement.targets) {
          lines.push(`      - id: ${yamlValue(c.id)}`);
          lines.push(`        type: file_contains`);
          lines.push(`        pattern: ${yamlValue(target)}`);
          if (c.enforcement.pattern) {
            lines.push(`        marker: ${yamlValue(c.enforcement.pattern)}`);
          }
          lines.push(`        description: ${yamlValue(c.enforcement.message ?? c.description)}`);
        }
      }
    }

    lines.push(`    next: ${yamlValue(nextStage?.name ?? 'null')}`);
    if (i < enabledStages.length - 1) {
      lines.push('');
    }
  }

  // Roles section
  lines.push('', 'roles:');
  for (const role of config.flow.roles) {
    lines.push(`  ${role.id}:`);
    lines.push(`    description: ${yamlValue(role.description)}`);
    if (role.reviewFocus && role.reviewFocus.length > 0) {
      lines.push(`    focus:`);
      for (const f of role.reviewFocus) {
        lines.push(`      - ${yamlValue(f)}`);
      }
    }
  }

  // Transitions section
  lines.push('', 'transitions:');
  for (let i = 0; i < enabledStages.length - 1; i++) {
    const from = enabledStages[i];
    const to = enabledStages[i + 1];
    const fromArtifacts = getStageArtifacts(from);

    lines.push(`  - from: ${yamlValue(from.name)}`);
    lines.push(`    to: ${yamlValue(to.name)}`);
    lines.push(`    requires:`);

    // Require all gate IDs from the 'from' stage
    for (const artifact of fromArtifacts) {
      const gateId = `${from.name}-${artifact.path.split('/').pop()?.replace(/\..*$/, '') ?? 'output'}`;
      lines.push(`      - ${yamlValue(gateId)}`);
    }
    // Also require enforced constraint gates
    const enforcedConstraints = config.flow.constraints.filter(
      (c) => c.enforced && (c.stageId === from.id || c.stageId === from.name)
    );
    for (const c of enforcedConstraints) {
      lines.push(`      - ${yamlValue(c.id)}`);
    }
  }

  return lines.join('\n') + '\n';
}
```

Also add the `getStageToolRules` helper and the import for `getStageArtifacts`:

```typescript
import { getStageArtifacts } from './stageArtifacts';

interface StageToolRules {
  allow: string[];
  deny: string[];
  writePaths: string[];
}

function getStageToolRules(stageName: string): StageToolRules {
  switch (stageName) {
    case 'think':
      return {
        allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Agent'],
        deny: ['Write', 'Edit', 'Bash'],
        writePaths: ['docs/**'],
      };
    case 'plan':
      return {
        allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Agent'],
        deny: ['Bash'],
        writePaths: ['docs/**'],
      };
    case 'build':
      return {
        allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Bash', 'Agent'],
        deny: [],
        writePaths: ['src/**', 'test/**', 'docs/**'],
      };
    case 'review':
      return {
        allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit'],
        deny: ['Bash'],
        writePaths: ['docs/**'],
      };
    case 'test':
      return {
        allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Bash'],
        deny: [],
        writePaths: ['test/**', 'docs/**'],
      };
    case 'ship':
      return {
        allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Bash'],
        deny: [],
        writePaths: ['**'],
      };
    case 'reflect':
      return {
        allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit'],
        deny: ['Bash'],
        writePaths: ['docs/**'],
      };
    default:
      return { allow: [], deny: [], writePaths: [] };
  }
}
```

### Task 3: Generate initial `state.json`

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/core/constraints.ts`

**Step 1: Add `generateInitialState` function**

```typescript
function generateInitialState(config: ProjectConfig): string {
  const enabledStages = config.flow.sprint
    .filter((s) => s.enabled)
    .sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order);

  const firstStage = enabledStages[0];
  const firstRole = firstStage?.roles[0] ?? 'ceo';
  const firstToolRules = firstStage ? getStageToolRules(firstStage.name) : { allow: [], writePaths: [] };

  const gates: Record<string, { passed: boolean; artifacts: string[] }> = {};
  for (const stage of enabledStages) {
    gates[stage.name] = { passed: false, artifacts: [] };
  }

  const state = {
    version: 1,
    project: config.project.name || 'unnamed',
    sprint: {
      current: firstStage?.name ?? 'think',
      history: [] as string[],
      started_at: '',
    },
    role: {
      current: firstRole,
      allowed_tools: firstToolRules.allow,
      allowed_paths: firstToolRules.writePaths,
    },
    gates,
  };

  return JSON.stringify(state, null, 2) + '\n';
}
```

**Step 2: Add state.json output to `generateCoreConstraints`**

After the constraints.yaml push, add:

```typescript
  // Generate initial state.json
  files.push({
    path: '.harness/state.json',
    content: generateInitialState(config),
  });
```

Expected: No errors

### Task 4: Rewrite `guard.sh` вЂ” PreToolUse hook

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/engines/claude/hooks.ts`

**Step 1: Replace `renderRoleCheckScript` with `renderGuardScript`**

Replace the entire `renderRoleCheckScript` function with:

```typescript
function renderGuardScript(): string {
  return [
    '#!/usr/bin/env bash',
    '# guard.sh вЂ” PreToolUse: enforce stage/role constraints from constraints.yaml',
    '# Reads state.json + constraints.yaml в†’ allow (exit 0) or block (exit 2)',
    '# .harness/ directory is never writable вЂ” AI cannot tamper with state.',
    '',
    'set -uo pipefail',
    '',
    'INPUT=$(cat || true)',
    'HARNESS=".harness"',
    '',
    '# Require state.json and constraints.yaml',
    'if [ ! -f "$HARNESS/state.json" ] || [ ! -f "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" ]; then',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Extract tool_name from stdin JSON',
    'TOOL=""',
    'FILE=""',
    'if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then',
    '  TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // \\"\\\"" 2>/dev/null || echo "")',
    '  FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.command // \\"\\\"" 2>/dev/null || echo "")',
    'else',
    '  TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o \'"tool_name":"[^"]*"\' | head -1 | sed \'s/"tool_name":"//;s/"//\' 2>/dev/null || echo "")',
    'fi',
    '',
    'if [ -z "$TOOL" ]; then',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Read current stage from state.json',
    'STATE=$(cat "$HARNESS/state.json")',
    'STAGE=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r \'.sprint.current // "think"\')',
    '',
    '# Protect critical directories from writes (security boundary)',
    'if [[ "$TOOL" == "Write" || "$TOOL" == "Edit" ]]; then',
    '  case "$FILE" in',
    '    .harness/*)',
    '      echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify .harness/ вЂ” state is managed by hooks only" >&2',
    '      exit 2',
    '      ;;',
    '    .claude/hooks/*|.claude/scripts/*)',
    '      echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify .claude/hooks/ or .claude/scripts/ вЂ” enforcement scripts are read-only" >&2',
    '      exit 2',
    '      ;;',
    '  esac',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Read stage rules from constraints.yaml',
    '# Fail-closed: if yq missing, block everything to prevent silent bypass',
    'if ! command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then',
    '  echo "BLOCKED: yq is required for constraint enforcement. Install: brew install yq" >&2',
    '  exit 2',
    'fi',
    '',
    'STAGE_CFG=$(yq ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$STAGE\\")" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" 2>/dev/null)',
    '',
    'if [ -z "$STAGE_CFG" ]; then',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Check deny list',
    'DENIED=$(echo "$STAGE_CFG" | yq \'.tools.deny[]\' 2>/dev/null)',
    'if echo "$DENIED" | grep -qx "$TOOL"; then',
    '  echo "BLOCKED: Tool \\"$TOOL\\" not allowed in $STAGE stage" >&2',
    '  exit 2',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Check write path permissions',
    'if [[ "$TOOL" == "Write" || "$TOOL" == "Edit" ]]; then',
    '  if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then',
    '    ALLOWED_PATHS=$(echo "$STAGE_CFG" | yq \'.paths.write[]\' 2>/dev/null)',
    '    MATCH=false',
    '    while IFS= read -r pattern; do',
    '      [ -z "$pattern" ] && continue',
    '      # shellcheck disable=SC2254',
    '      case "$FILE" in',
    '        $pattern) MATCH=true; break ;;',
    '      esac',
    '    done <<< "$ALLOWED_PATHS"',
    '    if [[ "$MATCH" == false ]]; then',
    '      echo "BLOCKED: Writing to \\"$FILE\\" not allowed in $STAGE stage" >&2',
    '      echo "Allowed paths: $(echo "$ALLOWED_PATHS" | tr \'\\n\' \' \')" >&2',
    '      exit 2',
    '    fi',
    '  fi',
    'fi',
    '',
    'exit 0',
  ].join('\n');
}
```

**Step 2: Update `generateClaudeHooks` to use new guard script**

In `generateClaudeHooks`, replace the role-check file push:

```typescript
  // Replace:
  //   files.push({ path: '.claude/hooks/role-check.sh', content: renderRoleCheckScript() });
  // With:
  files.push({
    path: '.claude/hooks/guard.sh',
    content: renderGuardScript(),
  });
```

Run: `npx tsc --noEmit`
Expected: No errors

**Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git commit -m "feat: rewrite guard.sh to read constraints.yaml for stage enforcement"
```

### Task 5: Add `advance.sh` вЂ” PostToolUse gate checker

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/engines/claude/hooks.ts`

**Step 1: Add `renderAdvanceScript` function**

Add after `renderGuardScript`:

```typescript
function renderAdvanceScript(): string {
  return [
    '#!/usr/bin/env bash',
    '# advance.sh вЂ” PostToolUse: check gates and update state.json',
    '# After each tool use, checks if current stage gates are satisfied.',
    '# Updates state.json gates.{stage}.passed = true when all gates pass.',
    '',
    'set -uo pipefail',
    '',
    'HARNESS=".harness"',
    '',
    'if [ ! -f "$HARNESS/state.json" ] || [ ! -f "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" ]; then',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'if ! command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1 || ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then',
    '  # Fail-closed: log error but don\'t block tool execution (PostToolUse should not block)',
    '  echo "[Harness] WARNING: jq/yq missing, gate checking disabled. Install: brew install jq yq" >&2',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'STATE=$(cat "$HARNESS/state.json")',
    'STAGE=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r \'.sprint.current // "think"\')',
    '',
    '# Skip if already passed',
    'ALREADY=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r ".gates.\\"$STAGE\\".passed // false")',
    'if [ "$ALREADY" = "true" ]; then',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Get gates for current stage',
    'GATES=$(yq ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$STAGE\\") | .gates" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" 2>/dev/null)',
    'if [ -z "$GATES" ] || [ "$GATES" = "null" ]; then',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'GATE_COUNT=$(echo "$GATES" | yq \'length\' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")',
    'if [ "$GATE_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then',
    '  # No gates вЂ” mark as passed',
    '  echo "$STATE" | jq --arg s "$STAGE" \'.gates[$s].passed = true\' > "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" && mv "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" "$HARNESS/state.json"',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    'ALL_PASS=true',
    'ARTIFACTS="[]"',
    '',
    'for i in $(seq 0 $((GATE_COUNT - 1))); do',
    '  TYPE=$(echo "$GATES" | yq ".[$i].type" 2>/dev/null)',
    '  PATTERN=$(echo "$GATES" | yq ".[$i].pattern" 2>/dev/null)',
    '  ID=$(echo "$GATES" | yq ".[$i].id" 2>/dev/null)',
    '',
    '  PASS=false',
    '  case "$TYPE" in',
    '    file_exists)',
    '      if ls $PATTERN 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then',
    '        PASS=true',
    '      fi',
    '      ;;',
    '    file_nonempty)',
    '      if [ -s "$PATTERN" ] 2>/dev/null; then',
    '        PASS=true',
    '      fi',
    '      ;;',
    '    file_contains)',
    '      MARKER=$(echo "$GATES" | yq ".[$i].marker" 2>/dev/null)',
    '      if grep -q "$MARKER" "$PATTERN" 2>/dev/null; then',
    '        PASS=true',
    '      fi',
    '      ;;',
    '  esac',
    '',
    '  if [ "$PASS" = false ]; then',
    '    ALL_PASS=false',
    '  else',
    '    ARTIFACTS=$(echo "$ARTIFACTS" | jq --arg a "$ID" \'. += [$a]\')',
    '  fi',
    'done',
    '',
    'if [ "$ALL_PASS" = true ]; then',
    '  echo "$STATE" | jq --arg s "$STAGE" --argjson a "$ARTIFACTS" \'.gates[$s].passed = true | .gates[$s].artifacts = $a\' > "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" && mv "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" "$HARNESS/state.json"',
    '  echo "[Harness] Stage $STAGE gates PASSED. Ready to advance with next slash command."',
    'fi',
    '',
    'exit 0',
  ].join('\n');
}
```

**Step 2: Add to `generateClaudeHooks`**

```typescript
  files.push({
    path: '.claude/hooks/advance.sh',
    content: renderAdvanceScript(),
  });
```

**Step 3: Verify build**

Run: `npx tsc --noEmit`
Expected: No errors

**Step 4: Commit**

```bash

git commit -m "feat: add advance.sh PostToolUse hook for gate checking"
```

### Task 6: Add `transition.sh` вЂ” Stage transition script

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/engines/claude/hooks.ts`

**Step 1: Add `renderTransitionScript` function**

```typescript
function renderTransitionScript(): string {
  return [
    '#!/usr/bin/env bash',
    '# transition.sh вЂ” Stage transition: check gates, update state, switch role',
    '# Called by slash commands: bash .claude/hooks/transition.sh <target-stage>',
    '# Exit 0 = success, exit 1 = blocked (gates not passed)',
    '',
    'set -uo pipefail',
    '',
    'TARGET="${1:-}"',
    'HARNESS=".harness"',
    '',
    'if [ -z "$TARGET" ]; then',
    '  echo "Usage: bash .claude/hooks/transition.sh <target-stage>" >&2',
    '  exit 1',
    'fi',
    '',
    'if [ ! -f "$HARNESS/state.json" ] || [ ! -f "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" ]; then',
    '  echo "ERROR: .harness/ not initialized. Run session-init.sh first." >&2',
    '  exit 1',
    'fi',
    '',
    'if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || ! command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then',
    '  echo "ERROR: jq and yq are required. Install with: brew install jq yq" >&2',
    '  exit 1',
    'fi',
    '',
    'STATE=$(cat "$HARNESS/state.json")',
    'CURRENT=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r \'.sprint.current\')',
    '',
    'if [ "$CURRENT" = "$TARGET" ]; then',
    '  echo "Already in $TARGET stage."',
    '  exit 0',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Check transition rules',
    'REQUIRES=$(yq ".transitions[] | select(.from == \\"$CURRENT\\" and .to == \\"$TARGET\\") | .requires[]" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" 2>/dev/null)',
    '',
    'if [ -z "$REQUIRES" ]; then',
    '  echo "BLOCKED: No valid transition from $CURRENT to $TARGET" >&2',
    '  echo "Check .harness/constraints.yaml for valid stage order." >&2',
    '  exit 1',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Check all required gates passed',
    'BLOCKED=""',
    'for gate in $REQUIRES; do',
    '  PASSED=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r ".gates.\\"$CURRENT\\".passed // false")',
    '  if [ "$PASSED" != "true" ]; then',
    '    BLOCKED="$BLOCKED  - $gate\\n"',
    '  fi',
    'done',
    '',
    'if [ -n "$BLOCKED" ]; then',
    '  echo "BLOCKED: Cannot advance from $CURRENT to $TARGET" >&2',
    '  echo "Required gates not passed:" >&2',
    '  echo -e "$BLOCKED" >&2',
    '  echo "Run: bash .harness/scripts/check.sh" >&2',
    '  exit 1',
    'fi',
    '',
    '# Transition allowed вЂ” update state',
    'NEW_STATE=$(echo "$STATE" | jq --arg t "$TARGET" \'',
    '  .sprint.history += [.sprint.current] |',
    '  .sprint.current = $t',
    '\')',
    '',
    '# Update role from target stage config',
    'NEW_ROLE=$(yq ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$TARGET\\") | .roles[0]" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" 2>/dev/null)',
    'NEW_TOOLS=$(yq -o=j ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$TARGET\\") | .tools.allow" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" 2>/dev/null)',
    'NEW_PATHS=$(yq -o=j ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$TARGET\\") | .paths.write" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" 2>/dev/null)',
    '',
    'NEW_STATE=$(echo "$NEW_STATE" | jq --arg r "$NEW_ROLE" --argjson t "$NEW_TOOLS" --argjson p "$NEW_PATHS" \'',
    '  .role.current = $r |',
    '  .role.allowed_tools = $t |',
    '  .role.allowed_paths = $p',
    '\')',
    '',
    'echo "$NEW_STATE" > "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" && mv "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" "$HARNESS/state.json"',
    '',
    'echo "Transitioned: $CURRENT в†’ $TARGET (role: $NEW_ROLE)"',
    'echo "Run /$TARGET to begin the next stage."',
    '',
    'exit 0',
  ].join('\n');
}
```

**Step 2: Add to `generateClaudeHooks`**

```typescript
  files.push({
    path: '.claude/hooks/transition.sh',
    content: renderTransitionScript(),
  });
```

Expected: No errors

### Task 7: Generate `check.sh` and update `session-init.sh`

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/engines/claude/sessionScripts.ts`

**Step 1: Add `renderCheckScript` function**

```typescript
function renderCheckScript(): string {
  return `#!/usr/bin/env bash
# check.sh вЂ” Display current harness state machine status
set -uo pipefail

HARNESS=".harness"

if [ ! -f "$HARNESS/state.json" ]; then
  echo "Harness not initialized. Run: bash .claude/scripts/session-init.sh"
  exit 1
fi

if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  cat "$HARNESS/state.json"
  exit 0
fi

STATE=$(cat "$HARNESS/state.json")
STAGE=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r '.sprint.current')
ROLE=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r '.role.current')
HISTORY=$(echo "$STATE" | jq -r '.sprint.history | join(" в†’ ")')

echo "в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—"
echo "в•‘        Harness State Machine         в•‘"
echo "в• в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•Ј"
echo "в•‘ Stage:  $STAGE"
echo "в•‘ Role:   $ROLE"
echo "в•‘ History: ${HISTORY:-none}"
echo "в• в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•Ј"
echo "в•‘ Gates:"
echo "$STATE" | jq -r '.gates | to_entries[] | "в•‘   \(.key): \(if .value.passed then "вњ… PASSED" else "вќЊ pending" end)"'
echo "в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ"
`;
}
```

**Step 2: Rewrite `SESSION_INIT_SCRIPT` to include state machine init**

```typescript
const SESSION_INIT_SCRIPT = `#!/usr/bin/env bash
# session-init.sh вЂ” Initialize harness state machine
set -euo pipefail

HARNESS=".harness"

# Check dependencies вЂ” hard fail, do not initialize without jq and yq
for cmd in jq yq; do
  if ! command -v $cmd &>/dev/null; then
    echo "FATAL: $cmd is required for state machine enforcement."
    echo "Without $cmd, the hook state machine cannot function."
    echo "Install: brew install $cmd"
    exit 1
  fi
done

# Initialize state.json if not present
if [ ! -f "$HARNESS/state.json" ] && [ -f "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml" ]; then
  STAGES=$(yq '.stages[].name' "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml")
  FIRST=$(echo "$STAGES" | head -1)
  FIRST_ROLE=$(yq ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$FIRST\\") | .roles[0]" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml")
  FIRST_TOOLS=$(yq -o=j ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$FIRST\\") | .tools.allow" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml")
  FIRST_PATHS=$(yq -o=j ".stages[] | select(.name == \\"$FIRST\\") | .paths.write" "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml")

  GATES_JSON="{}"
  for s in $STAGES; do
    GATES_JSON=$(echo "$GATES_JSON" | jq --arg s "$s" '. + {($s): {"passed": false, "artifacts": []}}')
  done

  PROJECT=$(yq '.project // "unnamed"' "$HARNESS/constraints.yaml")

  jq -n \\
    --arg p "$PROJECT" \\
    --arg s "$FIRST" \\
    --arg r "$FIRST_ROLE" \\
    --argjson t "$FIRST_TOOLS" \\
    --argjson pa "$FIRST_PATHS" \\
    --argjson g "$GATES_JSON" \\
    '{version:1, project:$p, sprint:{current:$s,history:[],started_at:""}, role:{current:$r,allowed_tools:$t,allowed_paths:$pa}, gates:$g}' \\
    > "$HARNESS/state.json"

  echo "State machine initialized."
fi

# Write started_at timestamp
if [ -f "$HARNESS/state.json" ]; then
  jq --arg t "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" '.sprint.started_at = $t' \
    "$HARNESS/state.json" > "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" \
    && mv "$HARNESS/state.json.tmp" "$HARNESS/state.json"
fi

# Create session directory
mkdir -p .claude/sessions

# Also init legacy files for backward compat
echo "$(jq -r '.sprint.current' "$HARNESS/state.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 'think')" > .harness/current-stage 2>/dev/null || true
echo "$(jq -r '.role.current' "$HARNESS/state.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 'ceo')" > .harness/current-role 2>/dev/null || true

echo ""
echo "Harness initialized. Start with: /think"
echo "Check status anytime: bash .harness/scripts/check.sh"
`;
```

In the `generateSessionScripts` function, add before the return:

```typescript

  files.push({
    path: '.harness/scripts/check.sh',
    content: renderCheckScript(),
  });
```

Expected: No errors

**Step 5: Commit**


### Task 8: Update hook registrations in settings.json

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/engines/claude/hooks.ts`

**Step 1: Replace `buildClaudeHookRegistrations` with state machine hooks**

Replace the entire function. Key changes:
- Remove old `role-check.sh` reference в†’ use `guard.sh`
- Remove old `stage-advance-guard.sh` в†’ use `advance.sh`
- Add PostToolUse hook for `advance.sh` on all tools

```typescript
export function buildClaudeHookRegistrations(
  config: ProjectConfig
): Record<string, Array<{ matcher: string; hooks: Array<{ type: string; command: string }> }>> {
  const registrations: Record<
    string,
    Array<{ matcher: string; hooks: Array<{ type: string; command: string }> }>
  > = {};

  // PreToolUse: guard.sh вЂ” enforce stage/role/tool constraints
  registrations['PreToolUse'] = [
    // Constraint check for Bash commands (dangerous command blocking)
    {
      matcher: 'Bash',
      hooks: [{ type: 'command', command: '.claude/hooks/constraint-check.sh' }],
    },
    // State machine guard вЂ” check tool permissions and write paths
    {
      matcher: '',
      hooks: [{ type: 'command', command: '.claude/hooks/guard.sh' }],
    },
  ];

  // PostToolUse: advance.sh вЂ” check gates after each tool use
  registrations['PostToolUse'] = [
    {
      matcher: '',
      hooks: [{ type: 'command', command: '.claude/hooks/advance.sh' }],
    },
  ];

  // Keep emit-event for logging (on write-like operations only)
  for (const tool of ['Write', 'Edit', 'Bash']) {
    registrations['PostToolUse'].push({
      matcher: tool,
      hooks: [{ type: 'command', command: '.claude/hooks/emit-event.sh' }],
    });
  }

  // Secret detection hook (vault credential policy)
  if (hasSecretCheck(config)) {
    registrations['PreToolUse'].push({
      matcher: 'Write',
      hooks: [{ type: 'command', command: '.claude/hooks/secret-check.sh' }],
    });
  }

  // Session save hook (git-based session storage)
  if (config.architecture.session.storage === 'git-based') {
    for (const tool of ['Write', 'Edit', 'Bash']) {
      registrations['PostToolUse'].push({
        matcher: tool,
        hooks: [{ type: 'command', command: '.claude/scripts/session-save.sh' }],
      });
    }
  }

  // Merge user-defined hooks from config.integration.hooks
  for (const hook of config.integration.hooks) {
    if (!registrations[hook.event]) {
      registrations[hook.event] = [];
    }
    registrations[hook.event].push({
      matcher: '',
      hooks: [{ type: 'command', command: hook.command }],
    });
  }

  return registrations;
}
```

**Step 2: Remove old `renderRoleCheckScript` and `renderStageAdvanceGuardScript` functions**

Delete the `renderRoleCheckScript` and `renderStageAdvanceGuardScript` functions entirely вЂ” they are replaced by `guard.sh` and `advance.sh`.

**Step 3: Update `generateClaudeHooks` вЂ” remove old references**

In `generateClaudeHooks`, remove the old file pushes for:
- `.claude/hooks/role-check.sh`
- `.claude/hooks/stage-advance-guard.sh`

Keep the gate scripts (build-gate, review-gate, etc.) вЂ” they are still useful as manual verification scripts.


### Task 10: Update CLAUDE.md generator for state machine protocol

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/engines/claude/claudeMd.ts`

**Step 1: Read current claudeMd.ts to understand structure**

Read the file and find the harness protocol section.

**Step 2: Add state machine protocol section**

Add to the generated CLAUDE.md content, in the harness protocol section:

```markdown
## State Machine Protocol

This project uses a file-based state machine for sprint enforcement:

1. **Initialization**: Run `bash .claude/scripts/session-init.sh` at session start
2. **Stage Entry**: Use slash commands (`/think`, `/plan`, etc.) вЂ” each calls `transition.sh`
3. **Gate Enforcement**: `guard.sh` blocks disallowed tools; `advance.sh` checks gates after each action
4. **State**: Stored in `.harness/state.json` вЂ” you CANNOT modify this file directly
5. **Status**: Run `bash .harness/scripts/check.sh` anytime to see current state

### Rules
- NEVER attempt to edit `.harness/state.json` or `.harness/constraints.yaml` вЂ” they are read-only to you
- If `transition.sh` blocks you, complete the current stage gates first
- Each stage has specific tool and path restrictions вЂ” `guard.sh` enforces them
```

**Step 3: Verify build**

Run: `npx tsc --noEmit`
Expected: No errors

**Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add src/generators/engines/claude/claudeMd.ts
git commit -m "feat: add state machine protocol to generated CLAUDE.md"
```

### Task 11: Cross-engine degradation вЂ” Codex skills

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/generators/engines/codex/skills.ts`

**Step 1: Add constraint headers to each skill**

In `generateCodexSkills`, modify the `sections` array to include constraint info from the state machine:

```typescript
function formatStateMachineConstraints(config: ProjectConfig, stageName: string): string {
  // Read stage tool rules
  const toolRules = getStageToolRulesExternal(stageName);
  const artifacts = DEFAULT_STAGE_ARTIFACTS_EXTERNAL[stageName] ?? [];

  if (!toolRules) return '';

  const lines: string[] = [
    '## Constraints (Auto-enforced in Claude Code, advisory here)',
    '',
    'State file: `.harness/state.json`',
    `Current stage: ${stageName}`,
    '',
    '### Tool Restrictions',
  ];

  if (toolRules.deny.length > 0) {
    lines.push(`- DO NOT use: ${toolRules.deny.join(', ')}`);
  }
  if (toolRules.allow.length > 0) {
    lines.push(`- Allowed tools: ${toolRules.allow.join(', ')}`);
  }

  lines.push('', '### Write Restrictions');
  for (const p of toolRules.writePaths) {
    lines.push(`- Write allowed: ${p}`);
  }

  if (artifacts.length > 0) {
    lines.push('', '### Gate Requirements');
    for (const a of artifacts) {
      lines.push(`- Must produce: ${a.path} вЂ” ${a.description}`);
    }
  }

  lines.push('');
  return lines.join('\n');
}
```

Import the needed helpers or inline the stage tool rules directly (copy from Task 2's `getStageToolRules` since Codex generator can't import from Claude-specific code):

```typescript
const STAGE_TOOL_RULES: Record<string, { allow: string[]; deny: string[]; writePaths: string[] }> = {
  think: { allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Agent'], deny: ['Write', 'Edit', 'Bash'], writePaths: ['docs/**'] },
  plan: { allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Agent'], deny: ['Bash'], writePaths: ['docs/**'] },
  build: { allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Bash', 'Agent'], deny: [], writePaths: ['src/**', 'test/**', 'docs/**'] },
  review: { allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit'], deny: ['Bash'], writePaths: ['docs/**'] },
  test: { allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Bash'], deny: [], writePaths: ['test/**', 'docs/**'] },
  ship: { allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Bash'], deny: [], writePaths: ['**'] },
  reflect: { allow: ['Read', 'Grep', 'Glob', 'Write', 'Edit'], deny: ['Bash'], writePaths: ['docs/**'] },
};
```
